name: Goppy
short_description: Goppy is a cute little fish who loves eating his yummy green treats, but he needs help to avoid the nippy-creepy-crawlies. With its vibrant graphics and easy-to-pick-up gameplay, "Goppy" feels like a holiday.
detailed_description:
Goppy is a cute little fish who loves eating his yummy green treats, but he needs help to avoid the nippy-creepy-crawlies.

"Goppy" is a simple and short casual game, designed to be relaxing and fun. 

Easy-to-pick-up gameplay will help you wind down and get immersed quickly, and lovingly drawn graphics give the impression of a tropical paradise. 
You can adjust the difficulty from a relaxing "Casual" up to a crazily challenging "FUN" mode. 

In "Endless" mode you can compete with players from around the world for the first place on the global leaderboard.
